title: Country On Join
description: Broadcasts join messages mentioning the country from which the players connects.
body:
Welcome! This is the Fabric recreation of Country On Join Plugin for Bungee and Bukkit.

Note: This mod is not affiliated with the original Country On Join Plugin.

## **What does it do?**

It broadcasts join messages mentioning the country from which the players connects. Like this:
![Screenshot of the chat showing how the mod works](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ede83d37a6f1ce21e72a9b0cec0340e997ee739f.png)

Made with ❤️ in Serbia
